raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "With the increased number of e-bikes on the road, e-bike injuries have become more common.",
    "E-bike injuries have become more prevalent than traditional bicycle injuries.",
    "Children 13 years and under make up the majority of e-bike injuries requiring a hospital visit.",
    "According to the National Electronic Injury Surveillance System, there were 3,945 e-bike injuries between 2011 and 2020.",
    "E-bike injuries increased over time during the study period.",
    "The 10-13 year old age group made up 44% of e-bike injuries during the study period.",
    "Children under the age of 14 made up 72% of e-bike injuries over the study period."
  ]
```
